name: Prompt Architect
description_en: Transform vague requests into structured, expert-level prompts.
description_zh: 把模糊的需求转化为结构化、专家级的提示词。
long_en: A skill that interviews you about intent and rewrites loose asks into precise, well-scoped prompts for any model.
long_zh: 一个围绕意图发问、把松散需求改写为精准且范围明确提示词的技能,适用于任意模型。
